description_long: This is a rectangular, multi-drawer cabinet with a brown frame and beige drawer faces, each accented by blue horizontal strips and small metallic handles. The cabinet features six evenly spaced drawers, all of which are front-facing and appear to be of equal size. The handles are symmetrically placed on the right side of each drawer, suggesting a uniform design. The side views reveal the cabinet's slim profile, with no protruding elements or visible legs, indicating it is likely designed to rest flush against a wall or surface. The materials suggest a sturdy construction, likely wood or engineered wood for the main body, with metal handles and possible internal metal runners. The overall appearance is functional and utilitarian, suitable for use in garages, workshops, or urban utility spaces.
description: A rectangular, six-drawer cabinet with a brown frame, beige drawer faces, blue accents, and metal handles. It has a slim, functional design ideal for storage in urban or utility settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing six beige drawers with blue accents and metal handles, all drawers visible and aligned.
description_view_1: Side profile showing the cabinet's slim depth and the alignment of the drawer handles, with no visible legs or protrusions.
description_view_2: Rear view identical to the front, showing the same six drawers and handle arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, mirroring view 1, showing the slim depth and handle alignment.
